steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
We need to find the value of $a$ where $f(a) = 14$. Substituting into the function $f(x) = \frac{x+10}{4}$:
$$\frac{a+10}{4} = 14$$

steps.title: Test choice C
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice C (46):
$$f(46) = \frac{46+10}{4} = \frac{56}{4} = 14$$
This equals 14, confirming the condition is satisfied. That is the correct answer.
